title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF GRANTS PASS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities, including an aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, certified lifeguard classes, youth and adult sports, and preschool and after-school child care programs. 1000 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 474-0001 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 474-0001 Main phone Main phone (541) 474-0001 Aquatics Coordinator Rita Kurz [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine and Western Jackson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Water Safety Education Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER DAY CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
